questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "plan"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "intend"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "predict"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "arrange"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "schedule"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "decide"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "promise"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "appointment"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "future"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "hope"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "expect"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "probably"?
Choose the best word: I will _____ tomorrow.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "I will decide tomorrow." — từ đúng là "decide" (quyết định).

questions.question: Choose the best word: I _____ I will call you.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "I promise I will call you." — từ đúng là "promise" (hứa).

questions.question: Choose the best word: I have a doctor's _____ at three.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "I have a doctor's appointment at three." — từ đúng là "appointment" (cuộc hẹn).

questions.question: Choose the best word: Nobody knows the _____.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Nobody knows the future." — từ đúng là "future" (tương lai).

questions.question: Choose the best word: I _____ you will pass the exam.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "I hope you will pass the exam." — từ đúng là "hope" (hy vọng).

questions.question: Choose the best word: We _____ good weather next week.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "We expect good weather next week." — từ đúng là "expect" (mong đợi).

questions.question: Choose the best word: She will _____ arrive late.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "She will probably arrive late." — từ đúng là "probably" (có lẽ).

questions.question: Choose the best word: I will _____ help you.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "I will definitely help you." — từ đúng là "definitely" (chắc chắn).

questions.question: Choose the best word: The weather _____ looks good.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "The weather forecast looks good." — từ đúng là "forecast" (dự báo).

questions.question: Choose the best word: My _____ is to speak fluently.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "My goal is to speak fluently." — từ đúng là "goal" (mục tiêu).

questions.question: Choose the best word: We are preparing for the trip. (_____)
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "We are preparing for the trip." — từ đúng là "prepare" (chuẩn bị).

questions.question: Choose the best word: The _____ holiday is exciting.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "The upcoming holiday is exciting." — từ đúng là "upcoming" (sắp tới).

questions.question: Complete the sentence: I think it ___ rain tomorrow.
questions.explanation: Use 'will' for a prediction based on opinion.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: Look at those clouds! It ___ rain.
questions.explanation: 'Going to' for predictions based on present evidence.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: I ___ meet my friend at six tonight (arranged).
questions.explanation: Present continuous for fixed future arrangements.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: She ___ visit her aunt next week.
questions.explanation: 'Be going to' + base verb for plans.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: Don't worry, I ___ help you.
Complete the sentence: We ___ to the cinema this evening (planned).
questions.explanation: Present continuous for a planned arrangement.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: Perhaps they ___ come later.
Complete the sentence: The train ___ at 9 a.m. (timetable).
Complete the sentence: I'm sure she ___ pass the test.
Complete the sentence: What ___ you going to do tonight?
Which English word means "kế hoạch"?
Which English word means "dự định"?
Which English word means "dự đoán"?
Which English word means "sắp xếp"?
Which English word means "lịch trình"?
Which English word means "quyết định"?
